title: SpoolInterpretation
description: Canonical SpoolInterpretation emitted by the Spool Interpreter. Mirrors the SpoolInterpretation Pydantic type in maatml.data.schemas. v2 adds `explanation` (2-4 sentence narrative) and `relatedDocs` (doc-key array).

explanation.description: 2-4 sentence narrative walking through the chain of events leading to the outcome. Distinct from `summary` (1-sentence recap). Required when `status != 'completed'`.

relatedDocs.description: Internal doc keys (not URLs) per failure category. Frontend maps keys to help links at render time.
